debug_log_issues.file: Triggered by wp eval in smoke test, but theme also calls bp_core_get_user_domain() in: inc/widgets/bp-profile-completion-widget.php:87, template-parts/header/buddypress-profile.php:118, template-parts/header/navigation.php:72. No browser request triggered this during the walk - may be suppressed by BP's internal compat layer at runtime. Recommend replacing all 3 theme usages with bp_members_get_user_url().

manual_required: Firefox Desktop: Customizer color picker drag interaction for primary color and typography color - verify color value commits correctly on mouseup outside the picker widget.
Firefox Desktop: Dark-mode toggle keyboard accessibility - Tab to toggle, Enter/Space activates, aria-pressed announces state change to screen reader.
Firefox Desktop: BP nouveau activity stream infinite scroll - verify no layout jank or overflow at 1440px.
Safari iOS (390px): Dark-mode toggle tap target size - must be min 44x44pt; verify tapping does not accidentally trigger adjacent nav items.
Safari iOS (390px): BP profile tab navigation horizontal scroll - swipe behavior on member profile subnav at 390px viewport.
Safari iOS (390px): WooCommerce checkout form inputs - verify no zoom-on-focus triggered by font-size < 16px on form fields.
RTL (Hebrew/Arabic locale): Primary templates rendering right-to-left without overflow; icon mirroring; brand glyphs untransformed.
Accessibility: Focus rings visible on all interactive elements; tab order logical from header to footer; icon-only buttons have aria-label (dark-mode toggle, search icon).
